critical_notes:
• Revenue of $1,278,219 is 56% above the prior 3-month average — strong performance
• Gross margin at 28.6% is 5.4 pts below L3M average — margin compression
• Net income turned positive at $63,962 after averaging $-100,222 over prior 3 months
• Operating cash flow is negative at $-218,377
• Year-over-year revenue is up 83% vs January 2025
• 13 customers classified as 'At Risk' with $578,127 in historical revenue
• 63 customers are Hibernating (no recent purchases)
• 3 of top 10 customers have GP margin below 15%: Kenworth of  Louisiana, Volvo Group NA, Inc, Peterbilt Pacific
• Order backlog of $1,213,202 across 42 orders (avg age: 57 days)
• 7 orders (17%) are over 90 days old — potential delivery risk
• $625,377 (52%) of backlog expected to ship within 30 days
action_items:
• Review product mix and pricing; identify margin erosion sources
• Monitor cash position; review AR collections and AP timing
• Prioritize outreach to 13 At Risk customers before they churn
• Run targeted reactivation campaign for top Hibernating accounts
• Review pricing strategy for low-margin key accounts
• Review 7 aged orders (>90 days) for delivery status and customer communication
